---
title: "The Rev. Canon Edgar Wharton"
---

## The Rev. Canon Edgar Wharton

### Description

Vicar of St. Mary-le-Wigford, Lincs..

### Biography

This is a conjectural identification

### Letters

- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Oct 19 [1898]](../letters/3386_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
